meaning: vi.制订战略[行动计划]vt.为...制订战略[行动计划]
examples: An SOA road map can help strategize the incremental plan.
Which: Identify your obstacles and strategize to overcome them.
"He's trying to strategize where we can keep marriage as God designed, " Scott said.
Given the time it takes between recordings, O'Brother can strategize while working out arrangements.
